title: Dutch Apricot Crumble Noodle Stir Fry
description: A spicy and savory Chinese-inspired noodle dish loaded with fresh apricots and crunchy crumble topping.

ingredients.name: Crumble Topping
ingredients.notes: Made from crumbly mixture of ingredients

instructions: 1. Cook the rice noodles according to package instructions.
2. In a pan, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat.
3. Add the spicy ground pork and cook until browned, breaking it up with a spatula as it cooks.
4. Add the soy sauce, sugar, and salt to the pan and stir to combine.
5. Add the cooked noodles to the pan and stir to combine with the pork mixture.
6. In a small bowl, mix together the Dutch apricot jam and crumble topping.
7. Pour the apricot-crumble mixture over the noodles and stir to combine.
8. Transfer the noodle mixture to a serving dish and top with additional crumble topping if desired.
9. Garnish with chopped scallions and serve immediately.
